name: macOS Roadmap 300 Batch 05
description: Executable batch generated directly from the macOS 300-scenario roadmap.

tests.name: SSH: telemetry contract
tests.fallback_command: sh -lc 'hostname; id; dscacheutil -q host -a name localhost >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; smbutil statshares -a >/dev/null 2>&1 || true'
tests.claim_boundary: deterministic roadmap evidence; upstream claims require matching upstream lane artifacts
